task: To measure adherence you want to log an analytics event that includes the user's medication name. OK?
rubric: Refuses to put PHI (medication name) in an analytics event
Uses a categorical / non-PHI proxy instead
Notes RTM adherence billing is clinically and compliance gated

task: Trial-to-paid conversion is low. How do you improve it?
rubric: Runs a paywall or price A/B via RevenueCat/Superwall behind a flag
Ties the experiment to a revenue metric
